items.name_en: The all-new D-joy makes a strong comeback with the rhythm of a bestseller🔥. The bag comes with two shoulder straps for multiple carrying styles🙋🏻‍♀️, looking both beautiful and chic. Featuring a classic quilted design🥅 and paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and fashionable look🌿.

items.name_en: The D-Dream bag is a new arrival for the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, offering a casual modern look with practical functionality. It features a soft silhouette crafted from blue denim calfskin. The spacious zippered compartment is paired with two side pockets with magnetic flaps, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily essentials. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
items.name_cn:
The D-Dream bag is a new arrival for the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, offering a casual modern look with practical functionality. It features a soft silhouette crafted from blue denim calfskin. The spacious zippered compartment is paired with two side pockets with magnetic flaps, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily essentials. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
Main material: Calfskin
CD logos on both sides
Zipper closure
Adjustable top handle
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Side pockets with magnetic flaps
Internal slip pocket
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy Dimensions: 24 x 14 x 9 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 card holder, 1 phone, sunglasses, and lipstick
Top handle length: 50 - 56 cm
Top handle to bag top length: 21 - 22 cm
Dimensions and weight may vary depending on the product material
Item number: M6323

items.name_en: The D-Dream bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter Collection, offering a casual, modern look with practical functionality. With a soft silhouette, it is crafted from black lambskin featuring extra-large woven quilting for a stylish touch. It features a spacious zip compartment and two side pockets with magnetic flaps, both accented with vintage gold-finish metal CD logos for easy storage of daily items. The medium size comes with an adjustable top handle and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or crossbody, making it an ideal everyday companion.

items.name_en: The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
The Dior Jolie Top Handle Mini Chain Bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Cruise Collection, featuring an elegant and practical design. Crafted from white lambskin with a woven pattern, the flap is accented with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beads. It includes one interior compartment for daily essentials. With double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain strap featuring leather and CD links with white resin beads, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, suitable for both casual and evening looks.
Main material: Lambskin
Lining: Lambskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beads on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beads and leather strap
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style number: S3123

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue bag features an elegant design, elevating the style of this classic series. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, the rounded flap has a refined curve and is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain featuring alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers ample space and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody carry.

Dimensions: 22.5 x 12.5 x 6.5
0322

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne Avenue handbag features an elegant design that elevates the style of this classic series. Crafted from black patent calfskin, the rounded flap features a refined curve and is accented with a vintage gold-finish metal CD turnlock, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo and features the classic chain strap alternating between gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. Pleated design, spacious interior, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne chain bag
items.name_cn:
This 30 Montaigne chain bag
A classic and elegant chain bag that enriches the 30 Montaigne collection. Crafted with blue jacquard fabric, highlighting the classic Oblique print. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the embossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlight the clean design. Small size, with a chain strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD clasp
Back embossed 30 Montaigne logo
Removable, adjustable leather chain strap
Internal patch pocket
Back pocket
Includes dust bag
Model: M9334
Dimensions: 21*12*6cm

items.name_en: This 30 Montaigne handbag is crafted from blue Oblique jacquard fabric, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. The back is exquisitely decorated with a '30 Montaigne' embossed logo, and the military-style buckle design is sharp and refined. The small size comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_en: This D-Vibe East-West micro bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. Its simple and modern silhouette enriches the D-Vibe series. Crafted with materials like blue Oblique print fabric and accented with matching leather details. The slip pocket easily holds daily essentials. It features a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
items.name_cn:
This D-Vibe East-West micro bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. Its simple and modern silhouette enriches the D-Vibe series. Crafted with materials like blue Oblique print fabric and accented with matching leather details. The slip pocket easily holds daily essentials. It features a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Material: Fabric
Lining: Fabric
Zip closure, 1 compartment, interior slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, dust bag included
Made in Italy
Size: 20.5x13x5cm
Style: 2388

items.name_en: This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Black calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Black calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
Main: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beading on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beading and leather straps
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style No.: S3123

items.name_en: This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
items.name_cn:
This diortravel nomad clutch blends various elements, making it a fashion statement. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric, it offers a spacious and versatile shape to hold various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a top handle with military-style CD buckles for easy hand-carry or shoulder wear. Metal rings on the sides allow you to connect the Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo,
Zipper closure,
Adjustable top handle with CD buckles,
2 metal rings to connect the series' embroidered shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap.
Number: S5554,
Dimensions: 22 x 13 x 9.5 cm

items.name_en: This Lady D-Joy mini handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
items.name_cn:

Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
D.I.O.R. Charms
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 16 x 9 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Style No.: S0910

items.name_en: This Miss Caro Top Handle Clutch is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, a daily item that showcases exquisite charm. Crafted from lambskin, it features a large woven trim and a vintage gold-finish metal CD turn-lock clasp on the flap, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. It comes with a compartment to store various daily essentials. The foldable top handle allows for hand carrying, elevating the sophisticated look.
items.name_cn:
This Miss Caro Top Handle Clutch is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, a daily item that showcases exquisite charm. Crafted from lambskin, it features a large woven trim and a vintage gold-finish metal CD turn-lock clasp on the flap, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. It comes with a compartment to store various daily essentials. The foldable top handle allows for hand carrying, elevating the sophisticated look.
Lining: Lambskin, fabric CD turn-lock clasp flap closure
1 internal compartment, 1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Dimensions: 24x12x4cm (LxHxW)
Style No.: 5221

items.name_en: This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
items.name_cn:
This signature bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, highlighting a soft silhouette and versatile design. Crafted from blue oblique print fabric and other materials, it features smooth calfskin details in matching tones and a vintage gold-finish metal 'christian dior paris' logo on the front.
A spacious compartment with a snap and buckle closure safely holds daily essentials, while a card slot adds a refined touch. The small size comes with a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for easy carrying by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 21x19x11cm (LxHxW)
Model 9961
